rows.label: xs00090150_MSG0001
rows.name:
See that residential unit? That's where
we live. That's where we're headed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00090150_MSG0002
rows.name: Hold on, there's a cliff up ahead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00090150_MSG0003
rows.name:
I'm not going to tell you not to
jump, but I wouldn't recommend it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00090150_MSG0004
rows.name:
The indigenous creatures down there are tough. Plus,
there's no guarantee you'd survive the fall unharmed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00090150_MSG0005
rows.name:
If we take this path across the walkway above the coastline,
we should be able to get there relatively safely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00090150_MSG0006
rows.name:
That being said[ST:wide ]― It's your
choice which way we go.[ST:wait ]
